news.headline: Starbucks Korea CEO fired over promotion that evoked military crackdown
news.summary: 'Tank Day' marketing campaign provoked backlash for eliciting bloody suppression of 1980 Gwangju uprising.

news.headline: ‘China holds the cards’: Why Putin’s visit to Beijing after Trump matters
news.summary: Scant progress in US-China talks bolsters Putin, while for China, hosting back-to-back visits is a diplomatic flex.
